arts.ttl: ‘We needed a top-level performance’ - Palace boss Oliver Glasner reacts to EFL quarter-final loss to Arsenal
arts.sum: “It is positive that we scored two goals, it’s not too easy to do that here,” said Glasner. “I mentioned before the game in the press conference that we need a performance at a top level, then it is possible to win here.

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury, suspension list and return dates for Crystal Palace: Tierney, Rice, Calafiori
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of Arsenal's latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash with Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Deadline has passed for Arsenal to keep hold of 27-year-old
arts.sum: Arsenal left-back Kieran Tierney is reportedly set to leave the club at the end of the season, and has been informed about the decision. The Scotland international has struggled for playing time at the Emirates Stadium after numerous problems with injuries, and it now looks like his Gunners career is over. arts.ttl: 'Amazing': Gabriel Jesus raves about one of his Arsenal teammates after scoring hat-trick vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Jesus was good but he was better!

arts.ttl: Arsenal make bombshell first January transfer window decision with talks set to take place
arts.sum: As a result, the report claims that Arsenal could lose Tierney for free when his contract expires at the end of the season. From January 1, Tierney will be able to negotiate a pre-contract agreement with clubs outside England over leaving Arsenal for free at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Forget Gabriel Jesus, £30m Arsenal player was the real difference maker vs Crystal Palace - opinion
arts.sum: Undoubtedly, Gabriel Jesus will steal all of the Arsenal headlines for his brilliant hat-trick against Crystal Palace in the EFL Cup. As frustrating as Arsenal...

arts.ttl: Every word Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta said on Jesus goals, Tierney sub and Odegaard response
arts.sum: I think it’s a great thing for him and the team that we can rely on a player of such quality. It’s the same with Kieran and other players who haven’t started many games and today they had the chance to do so.

arts.ttl: Second club in mix for forgotten Arsenal star as January transfer plan outlined
arts.sum: Clube Atletico Mineiro are interested in signing forgotten Arsenal star Marquinhos on loan in the January transfer window. However, Marquinhos returned to the Gunners halfway through the campaign after struggling in France and joined the Gunners from Sao Paulo in June 2022 on a long-term contract .

arts.ttl: I would have signed for Arsenal instead of Chelsea but Arsene Wenger ruined it
arts.sum: Former Chelsea and Manchester City star Shaun Wright-Phillips has admitted he could have followed in his father Ian Wright's footsteps and played for Arsenal but for a delay from Arsene Wenger. However, it is not like Arsenal was not on the table and but for City's need to sell quickly, the winger could have followed in his father's footsteps.

arts.ttl: No thanks: Arsenal & Chelsea don’t want Marcus Rashford…but Euro giants could be an option
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are reportedly not interested in taking the opportunity to move for Marcus Rashford, but Atletico Madrid could be an option for the Manchester United forward.
